calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Hao Bo Huang was present in pro per on his own behalf, and as Guardian ad litem for the minor, who was also present at today's hearing.
Wei Su, the minor's mother, was also present.
Petitioner and minor were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Bruno Bo Huang.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jadon Junbin Huang.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
